popularStory.headline: Cecily Bonville history
popularStory.description:
According to the website: http://www.tudorplace.com.ar/Bios/CecilyBonville(MDorset).htm

Cecily Bonville was born on or about 30 Jun 1460 at Shute Manor in Shute near Axminster, Devon, England. She wa …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Cecily Bonville於1460年6月30日出生在英國戴文書特時，她的父親William Bonville19歲，母親Catherine Neville18歲。她於1474年7月18日與Sir Thomas Grey在英國萊希斯特斯爾格洛比結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1529年5月12日在英國米德萊可沙可列維爾享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾艾斯利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Cecily Bonville于1460年6月30日出生在英国戴文書特时，她的父亲William Bonville19岁，母亲Catherine Neville18岁。她于1474年7月18日与Sir Thomas Grey在英国萊希斯特斯爾格洛比结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1529年5月12日在英国米德萊可沙可列維爾享年68岁，埋葬在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾艾斯利。

nameMeanings.name: Bonville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: variant of   Bonneville   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

variants.name: Bonneville
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Francois, Liette, Normand, Pierre.
French: habitational name from any of numerous places called Bonneville, from Old French bonne ‘good’ + ville ‘settlement’. Compare Bonville .
Altered form of French Bonnevialle: habitational name from Bonnevialle in the central part of France.

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Cecily Bonville was born on 30 June 1460, in Shute, Devon, England, her father, William Bonville, was 19 and her mother, Catherine Neville, was 18. She married Sir Thomas Grey on 18 July 1474, in Groby, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 12 May 1529, in Shacklewell, Middlesex, England, at the age of 68, and was buried in Astley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Cecily Bonville est née le 30 juin 1460, à Shute, Devon, Angleterre, son père, William Bonville, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Catherine Neville, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Grey le 18 juillet 1474, à Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 mai 1529, à Shacklewell, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à Astley, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Cecily Bonville am 30. Juni 1460 in Shute, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Bonville 19 und ihre Mutter Catherine Neville 18. Sie hat am 18. Juli 1474 in Groby, Leicestershire, England Sir Thomas Grey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. Mai 1529 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Shacklewell, Middlesex, England und wurde in Astley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Cecily Bonville è nata il il 30 giugno 1460 nel Shute, Devon, England, sua padre, William Bonville, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Catherine Neville, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Grey il 18 luglio 1474, nel Groby, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 12 maggio 1529, nel Shacklewell, Middlesex, England, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolta a Astley, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Cecily Bonvilleが1460年6月30日にイギリスデボンシュトで生まれた時，父William Bonvilleは19歳，母Catherine Nevilleは18歳であった。1474年7月18日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビーでSir Thomas Greyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1529年5月12日にイギリスミッドレセックスシャックルエルで68歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアアストリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: 영국 레이스스터실르 애쉬비 데 라 즈우치
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Cecily Bonville(이)가 1460년 6월 30일 영국 데폰 슈트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Bonville(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Neville(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1474년 7월 18일 영국 레이스스터실르 그로비에서 Sir Thomas Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1529년 5월 12일 영국 미들레세스 샤클루에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 애스틀리에 묻혔다.

pt.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Cecily Bonville nasceu em 30 de junho de 1460, em Shute, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Bonville, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Neville, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Grey em 18 de julho de 1474, em Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de maio de 1529, em Shacklewell, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 68 anos, e foi sepultada em Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Cecily Bonville родилась 30 июня 1460 г. в местности шут, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени William Bonville было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Neville, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Grey 18 июля 1474 г. в местности гроби, лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 12 мая 1529 г. в местности шаккльвелл, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности астли, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Cecily Bonville nació el 30 de junio de 1460, en Shute, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, William Bonville, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Catherine Neville, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Grey el 18 de julio de 1474, en Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 12 de mayo de 1529, en Shacklewell, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultada en Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
